line: Implemented the F10 operator-facing CLI health dashboard rendering and added targeted CLI health tests.
- Replaced the plain `membrain health` human output with a sectioned dashboard:

items: Replaced the plain `membrain health` human output with a sectioned dashboard:

line: - Added bounded ASCII bar helpers for utilization and quality display.

items: Added bounded ASCII bar helpers for utilization and quality display.

line: - Landed the smallest end-to-end F10 improvement in the CLI rendering layer first.

items: Landed the smallest end-to-end F10 improvement in the CLI rendering layer first.

line: - Did not broaden the seeded/demo health data pipeline because the current repo already has a shared health schema and the most obvious missing piece was the operator dashboard surface itself.

items: Did not broaden the seeded/demo health data pipeline because the current repo already has a shared health schema and the most obvious missing piece was the operator dashboard surface itself.

line: - Validation is currently blocked by an unrelated existing workspace compile failure:

items: Validation is currently blocked by an unrelated existing workspace compile failure:

line: - Because `membrain-cli` depends on `membrain-core`, both `cargo check` and targeted CLI test execution are blocked by that upstream error.

items: Because `membrain-cli` depends on `membrain-core`, both `cargo check` and targeted CLI test execution are blocked by that upstream error.

line: - There are concurrent edits by other agents on overlapping files, so the current diff also shows unrelated formatting/neighboring changes outside my intended F10 patch.

items: There are concurrent edits by other agents on overlapping files, so the current diff also shows unrelated formatting/neighboring changes outside my intended F10 patch.

line: - F10 was already partially wired across core/CLI/daemon/MCP, but the human CLI surface was still summary-style rather than dashboard-style.

items: F10 was already partially wired across core/CLI/daemon/MCP, but the human CLI surface was still summary-style rather than dashboard-style.

line: - The repo’s current blocker for validation is not in the F10 path; it is an upstream serde-bound issue in working-state types.

items: The repo’s current blocker for validation is not in the F10 path; it is an upstream serde-bound issue in working-state types.

line: {"status":"partial","completed":["Read AGENTS.md and repo docs","Registered as NavyOwl with MCP Agent Mail","Claimed bead mb-1ng.10","Coordinated with overlapping agents","Implemented CLI dashboard rendering for health","Added targeted CLI health tests"],"blocked_by":[{"type":"compile_error","file":"crates/membrain-core/src/engine/working_state.rs","detail":"TaskId lacks serde::Serialize and serde::Deserialize, blocking cargo check/test for dependent crates"}],"next_steps":["Fix or wait for the upstream TaskId serde issue","Re-run targeted CLI health tests","Re-run cargo check --all-targets","Then update bead/mail completion state"]}
